description: Bridge the gap between internal documents and external legibility — translate a resume, profile, portfolio, or analysis into what the audience needs to receive in order to act
usage: translate my resume for, make this legible to, how would a recruiter see this, optimize for ATS, write a cover letter from, turn my profile into a bio, make this make sense to someone who doesn't know me, bridge the gap, external version of, translate for hiring manager

source.description: What to translate — a resume, profile, portfolio, analysis, or any internal document. Can reference an uploaded file, workspace artifact, or conversation content.

audience.description: Who needs to receive this: hiring-manager, recruiter, ats, investor, client, partner, executive, public, or a specific company/person name

channel.description: Output format: resume, cover-letter, portfolio, pitch, brief, profile, or auto

intent.description: What you want the translation to accomplish — a specific role, a specific company, or a general positioning goal
